title: Student Studio Ano Poli: Calm 1-Bed Retreat

about.summary: Student studio Ano Poli located in the Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This calm studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for private student accommodation.

sections.title: Student Studio Ano Poli Guide
sections.content: This studio offers an excellent calm base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a wonderful private setup. You will find everything needed for everyday living.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience the area.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads wanting a quiet workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Located near City Centre Thessaloniki, you are right at the edge of Ano Poli. Daily tasks are very simple with local shops located just around the corner. Walking to city attractions is quick and easy.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a short 5-10 minute walk.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately based on consumption. For more details on the city, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Student Studio Ano Poli: Calm 1-Bed Retreat
seo.seo_description: Student studio Ano Poli ideal for Erasmus students. This calm 1-bed retreat is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
